title: Rich Flaky Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: A hearty, one-pot Slovakian dish featuring fatty and flaky pork dumplings, made with a rich dashi broth and steamed to perfection, perfect for a keto-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the pork shoulder, flour, egg, salt, and black pepper, and mix until just combined.
Gradually add the pork fat to the mixture, mixing until the dough comes together in a shaggy mass.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces, and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk, and place it in the bottom of a large pot or steamer.
Pour the dashi broth over the dumplings, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low, cover the pot, and steam the dumplings for 20 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped scallions and a side of melted pork fat.
